examples: Moor a ship to a dock; a dirigible moored to a tower.
Vimanas took off vertically, and were capable of hovering in the sky, like a modern helicopter or dirigible .
(aeronautics) designating an airship or dirigible having a form maintained by a stiff unyielding frame or structure.
Dirigible skippers of the last century did it regularly-though sometimes not more than once.
